荒南之地，三国鼎立。
九洲之内，王朝宗门林立。
有宗门天才，颇负盛名；有大国公主，声名远扬。
也有足不出户的皇子，被视为皇族之耻，成为远赴他国的质子。
少年在他国被公主所钦慕，被天才所仰视，身份，地位，背景，唾手可得。
大炎少了个皇子，大玄却多了个举世闻名的逍遥侯！
九洲亦多了个绝世剑仙！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7f568c6ca9e12bab1c1a8625f2e24c9c","author":"酥尘","author_id":"","book_id":"7418548239747533848","book_name":"太玄镇狱经","book_short_name":"逍遥剑首","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302838","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"12.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7418570436302094910","read_count":"125060","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2279310"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"946","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,穿越,天才,搞笑轻松,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a94e426657b635eaaf6869de7459348e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779430879&x-signature=fI1NYjv4yjorzS109hxh%2FBZNens%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1126349683304477","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"182"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323142119AFFECAC5F4EF7EF55EC6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration"
